# CWE-78 positive: shell command built from request input
lang: go
file: CWE-78-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-78 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command
// Vulnerable line: user host interpolated into sh -c.
func PingHost(c *gin.Context) {
	host := c.Query("host")
	cmd := exec.Command("sh", "-c", "ping -c 1 "+host)
	out, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": string(out)})
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, string(out))
}
